meaning: adj.较普通时刻[时期]早的,早熟的
examples: But the net that Rath used is now being cast to catch ever smaller fry.
The South African court halted the medical trials and banned Rath from advertising his natural AIDS remedies.
Brass specialist Michael Rath said restoring the instruments in his shop was the highlight of his career.
On Wednesday, Mr. Rath stepped down from the governorship but denied wrongdoing, saying in a statement that he thought the box contained wine.
